_doc: Default term map for the translator subskill. Workers MUST apply these for cross-deck consistency. Override per run with runs/<deck>/glossary.json (merged on top). Keys are source (zh) terms; values are the target-language rendering. This default targets English; ship a glossary.<lang>.json for other targets.
rules: 飞书 is ALWAYS Lark, never "Feishu".
Keep numbers / %, dates, currency, units, and proper-noun brand names byte-identical to the source.
Romanize Chinese company names to their established English form (Yum China, Chagee, Mixue, Luckin, Walmart, ...); keep product/brand names (TRAE, aily, Base, Miaoda) as-is.
Condense for fit: target text is longer than CJK and frames are fixed 1920x1080 — prefer the shortest accurate phrasing.
ASCII-ize CJK/fullwidth punctuation in the target ( ／→/  ＋→+  （）→()  「」→""  　→ space ).
